hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_response?.filePath||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(f)){process.exit(0)}else{process.exit(1)}})" && cd C:/claude/battleships/client && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 || true

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const j=JSON.parse(d);const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||j.tool_response?.filePath||'';if(f.includes('/shared/') && /\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(f)){process.exit(0)}else{process.exit(1)}})" && cd C:/claude/battleships && npm run test --workspace=shared 2>&1 | tail -10 || true
